prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to the Heat Network Technical Assurance Scheme, which is applicable in Scotland as part of the UK's efforts to ensure compliance and standards for heat network operations across all nations. Scotland has its own regulations and initiatives in place for energy distribution that align with these technical specifications.
